The text discusses a research paper titled "AI-Powered Defense Against Phishing Threats for Enterprises" published in the International Journal for Research in Applied Science & Engineering Technology. The paper presents an innovative Phishing Website Detection System designed to combat the persistent threat of phishing attacks that exploit human vulnerabilities.
